creator: chogata@moosefs.com
text: libfuse version 3.12.0 (fusefs-libs3-3.12.0) has a bug, a misspelled symbol that causes any program using a certain library function (fuse_parse_cmdline) to stop working. Versions 3.11.0 and 3.13.0 do not have this problem. Since both quarterly and latest package sets for latest FreeBSD release (13.1) for amd64 at the moment contain version 3.12.0 of libfuse, this is a big problem for all people that just installed a fresh system and cannot downgrade this package to the previous version. Therefore it would be good if latest could be upgraded to 3.13.0 soon.
